description.value: Some trinkets are useful for medicinal purposes. You have found another trinket of light Bulk that can serve as a tool for certain traditional medicinal uses and can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Conceal an Object] of negligible Bulk inside of it. You can use your Medicinal Trinket as a medkit when you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Treat Wounds]. The first time each day you use the Medicinal Trinket to use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Battle Medicine] or Treat Wounds on yourself, you gain additional temporary Hit Points equal to your level that last for 1 hour, regardless of the result of the attempt.
